title: brachypodium unilaterale
intro: Brachypodium unilaterale, also known as one-sided false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium unilaterale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Brachypodium unilaterale typically involve drying and infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea or infusing it in oil to create a topical remedy.
